system: Agentic SOC Phishing Detection System (LangGraph + GPT-4.1-mini + VirusTotal API + Memory + Tooling)
key_insights: Agentic system significantly improves precision due to LLM reasoning + structured SOC analysis
VirusTotal API reduces false positives on legitimate domains
Google Forms + external Gmail accounts consistently trigger high-risk classification
Suspicious class improves handling of edge-case phishing attempts
Baseline system underperforms due to lack of contextual reasoning
limitations: LLM introduces small variance across runs
VirusTotal API may return delayed or incomplete scans
Suspicious class complicates strict binary evaluation
